practices_zh: AGENTS.md 作为目录而非百科全书，指向更深层的真相来源
结构化 docs/ 目录作为知识库的系统记录
避免 LLM 生成的 AGENTS.md，应手工精心编写
使用 Skills 实现知识的渐进式披露，避免上下文污染
工具调用输出超过阈值时截断并存储到文件系统
practices_en: AGENTS.md as a directory, not an encyclopedia, pointing to deeper sources of truth
Structured docs/ directory as the system of record for the knowledge base
Avoid LLM-generated AGENTS.md; write it carefully by hand
Use Skills for progressive knowledge disclosure to avoid context pollution
Truncate tool call outputs exceeding thresholds and store to filesystem

practices_zh: 用自定义 linter 和结构性测试机械化执行架构约束
定义并强制执行模块边界
保持数据结构稳定
代码可读性优先考虑 Agent 可读性
使用 CI/CD 质量门控而非依赖人工代码审查
practices_en: Mechanically enforce architectural constraints with custom linters and structural tests
Define and enforce module boundaries
Keep data structures stable
Prioritize agent readability over human readability
Use CI/CD quality gates instead of relying on human code review

practices_zh: Generator-Evaluator 分离解决自我评估偏差问题
Sprint 合同机制：在编码前协商'完成'的定义
使用 Playwright MCP 让评估 Agent 直接与运行中的应用交互
Ralph Wiggum Loop：通过 Hook 拦截 Agent 退出尝试，强制继续工作
Sub-agents 作为'上下文防火墙'维持长期任务的连贯性
practices_en: Generator-Evaluator separation to solve self-evaluation bias
Sprint contract mechanism: negotiate the definition of 'done' before coding
Use Playwright MCP to let evaluator agents interact directly with running applications
Ralph Wiggum Loop: intercept agent exit attempts via hooks to force continued work
Sub-agents as 'context firewalls' to maintain coherence in long-running tasks

practices_zh: 记录 Agent 的所有过程日志
用高性价比模型（如 DeepSeek）对日志做过程摘要
打上关键路径标签，便于问题诊断
每个 git worktree 有独立的可观测性栈
暴露日志、指标和追踪给 Agent 直接查询
practices_en: Record all process logs of the agent
Use cost-effective models (e.g., DeepSeek) for process log summarization
Tag critical paths for easy problem diagnosis
Each git worktree has an independent observability stack
Expose logs, metrics and traces for agents to query directly

practices_zh: 每个 Harness 组件都编码了对模型能力的假设，需要持续验证
新模型发布时重新审视 Harness，去除不再必要的组件
当 Agent 挣扎时，将其视为信号：识别缺失的工具、护栏或文档
一次只移除一个组件并观察影响，避免大规模重构
找到最简单的解决方案，只在需要时增加复杂度
practices_en: Each Harness component encodes assumptions about model capabilities that need continuous validation
Revisit the Harness when new models are released, removing no-longer-necessary components
When an agent struggles, treat it as a signal: identify missing tools, guardrails, or documentation
Remove only one component at a time and observe the impact to avoid large-scale refactoring
Find the simplest solution and only add complexity when needed

practices_zh: 更少但更有表达力的工具优于庞大的工具集
组合式原语优于固执己见的工作流
让 Agent 通过 bash 工具自行设计工具
为 Agent 提供浏览器访问能力用于验证 UI 行为
使用沙箱隔离 Agent 执行环境，每个任务有独立的数据副本
practices_en: Fewer but more expressive tools over a large toolset
Composable primitives over opinionated workflows
Let agents design their own tools through bash tools
Provide agents with browser access for validating UI behavior
Use sandboxes to isolate agent execution environments with independent data copies per task
